player-only: §c[OllamaChat] This command can only be used by players!
config-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Configuration file is invalid, resetting to default.
no-permission: §c[OllamaChat] You do not have permission to use this command!
prompt-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Prompt Usage:
- /ollamachat prompt set <name> <content>
- /ollamachat prompt delete <name>
- /ollamachat prompt list
- /ollamachat prompt select <name>
- /ollamachat prompt clear
prompt-default-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Current default prompt '{name}' is invalid (not found).
conversation-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Conversation Usage:
- /ollamachat conversation new <ai-name> <name>
- /ollamachat conversation select <ai-name> <id>
- /ollamachat conversation delete <ai-name> <id>
- /ollamachat conversation list <ai-name>
conversation-default-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Current conversation '{name}' for {ai-name} is invalid (not found).
response-truncated: §e[OllamaChat] Response was truncated due to length limit.
suggests-rate-limit: §c[OllamaChat] Please wait {seconds} seconds before generating more suggestions.
suggested-response-hover: §eClick to send this suggestion as a prompt!
suggests-presets-enabled: §a[OllamaChat] Suggested response presets have been enabled.
suggests-presets-disabled: §c[OllamaChat] Suggested response presets have been disabled.
brave-api-key-set: §a[OllamaChat] Brave API key has been set successfully!
brave-safe-search-set: §a[OllamaChat] Brave safe search level set to: {level}
search-engine-not-configured: §c[OllamaChat] The selected search engine ({engine}) is not properly configured. Please check your config.yml
search-engine-missing-api-key: §c[OllamaChat] API key for {engine} is missing. Please set it using /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <key>
search-setkey-usage-multi:
§c[OllamaChat] Usage: /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <api-key>
Available engines: bocha, brave
search-setkey-bocha: §a[OllamaChat] Bocha API key has been set successfully!
search-setkey-brave: §a[OllamaChat] Brave API key has been set successfully!
search-usage:
§e[OllamaChat] Search Command Usage:
- /ollamachat search toggle - Enable/disable web search
- /ollamachat search status - Show search status
- /ollamachat search engine [name] - Show/change search engine
- /ollamachat search query <text> - Perform a web search
- /ollamachat search setkey <engine> <key> - Set API key for engine
- /ollamachat search setcount <number> - Set result count (1-50)
- /ollamachat search addkeyword <word> - Add trigger keyword
- /ollamachat search removekeyword <word> - Remove trigger keyword
- /ollamachat search listkeywords - List all trigger keywords
search-api-key-set: §a[OllamaChat] Bocha API key has been set successfully!
search-count-invalid: §c[OllamaChat] Invalid count! Please enter a number between 1 and 50.
search-keyword-added: §a[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' has been added to trigger list!
search-keyword-removed: §a[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' has been removed from trigger list!
search-keyword-exists: §c[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' already exists in trigger list!
search-keyword-not-found: §c[OllamaChat] Keyword '{keyword}' not found in trigger list!
search-disabled-error: §c[OllamaChat] Web search is currently disabled. Use /ollamachat search toggle to enable.
search-no-api-key: §c[OllamaChat] Bocha API key is not configured! Use /ollamachat search setkey <api-key> to set it.
